topic: Vellum AI Platform Review 2026: Best LLM Evaluation and Testing Tool?

competitors.title: Vellum AI Official Documentation - Platform Overview
key_points: Vellum AI is a unified platform for LLM evaluation, testing, and observability
Supports automated evaluation workflows with statistical significance testing
Provides testing gaits for CI/CD pipelines to block regressions before merge
Offers prompt optimization tools to reduce costs while maintaining quality
Supports multi-model routing and A/B testing for production LLM applications

competitors.title: 2026 LLM Evaluation Platform Market Analysis
key_points: LLM evaluation tools market reached $800M in 2026 with 35% CAGR
Key players: Vellum, Langfuse, LangSmith, Braintrust, Openlayer
Vellum positions as 'complete eval-to-production loop' solution
Vellum has Pro tier at $249/month with 1M spans free tier
Strongest for statistical significance testing and production quality gates

competitors.title: Best LLM Evaluation Tools 2026 Comparison
key_points: Braintrust: Strongest for complete eval-to-production loop, CI/CD quality gates
Langfuse: Open-source, self-hostable, strong SQL query layer, best for compliance-sensitive teams
Openlayer: Excel integration, best for product managers and business teams
Vellum: Strongest statistical testing, automated evaluation workflows
LangSmith: Part of LangChain ecosystem, best for LangChain-based applications
